verses.text: Mi thahatpa aw, bang hangin miphate suksiatna-ah kisial na hi hiam? Sunthapai-in, suksiatna na ngaihsunsun hi
Zuau nasempa aw, na leii a hiam pha mahmah mulkiatna tem tawh kibang hi
Hoihna sangin siatna na deihzaw a, thuman genna sangin zuauna na deihzaw hi
Mi a khem theipa aw, a siasak thei kammal khempeuh deih belin na nei hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang hong susia paisuak ding hi. Amah in nang hong bawhin na buk sung panin hong kaikhia ding a, a hingte' leitang panin hong zunglot ding hi
Thuman mite in nang hong mu-in, lau mahmah ding uh a, nang hong nuihsanin
“Pasian a bello, ama hauhnate a muang, ama hauhna a belpa en un,” hong ci ding uh hi
Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh Pasian' innsunga a om oliv kung a hing tawh ka kibang hi. Pasian' itna kip ka muang ngitnget hi
Hih bangin keimah hong bawlkhin na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam ngitnget ding hi. Thuhoih ahih manin miphate omna-ah nangma min ka taangko ding hi.
